targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT entity_id, time_index, stage
    FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"
    WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index)
        AND stage = 'HANDOVER_READY'
) final_count;

SELECT 
    AVG(duration_seconds)::bigint AS "Average Duration"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (time_index2 - time_index1)))::bigint AS duration_seconds
    FROM (
        SELECT
            time_index AS time_index1,
            LEAD(time_index, 10) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS time_index2,
            stage AS stage1,
            LEAD(stage, 10) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS stage2
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT entity_id, time_index, stage
            FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"
            WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index)
            ORDER BY time_index ASC
        ) unique_rows
    ) sub
    WHERE stage1 = 'ACTIVE' 
      AND stage2 = 'HANDOVER_READY'
      AND stage1 <> stage2
      AND time_index2 IS NOT NULL
) final_sub;

SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(entity_id, stage, time_index)) 
     FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle" 
     WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index) AND stage = 'DETECT_READY') 
    - 
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(entity_id, stage, time_index)) 
     FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle" 
     WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index) AND stage = 'HANDOVER_READY') 
AS "Difference";

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        time_index1
    FROM (
        SELECT
            time_index AS time_index1,
            LEAD(time_index, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS time_index2,
            stage AS stage1,
            LEAD(stage, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS stage2
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT entity_id, time_index, stage
            FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"
            WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index)
            ORDER BY time_index ASC
        ) unique_rows
    ) sub
    WHERE stage1 = 'ACTIVE' 
      AND stage2 <> 'DETECT_READY'
      AND stage1 <> stage2
      AND time_index2 IS NOT NULL
) final_count;

SELECT 
    AVG(duration_seconds)::bigint AS "Average Duration"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (time_index2 - time_index1)))::bigint AS duration_seconds
    FROM (
        SELECT
            time_index AS time_index1,
            LEAD(time_index, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS time_index2,
            stage AS stage1,
            LEAD(stage, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS stage2
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT entity_id, time_index, stage
            FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"
            WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index)
            ORDER BY time_index ASC
        ) unique_rows
    ) sub
    WHERE stage1 = 'DETECT_READY' 
      AND stage2 = 'PICK_READY'
      AND stage1 <> stage2
      AND time_index2 IS NOT NULL
) final_sub;

    ) sub
    WHERE stage1 = 'PICK_READY' 
      AND stage2 = 'FILL_READY'

            stage AS stage1,

SELECT 
    AVG(duration_seconds)::bigint AS "Average Duration"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (time_index2 - time_index1)))::bigint AS duration_seconds
    FROM (
        SELECT
            time_index AS time_index1,
            LEAD(time_index, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS time_index2,
            stage AS stage1,
            LEAD(stage, 2) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS stage2
        FROM (

            FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"

        ) unique_rows
    ) sub
    WHERE stage1 = 'CAP_READY' 
      AND stage2 = 'HANDOVER_READY'
      AND stage1 <> stage2
      AND time_index2 IS NOT NULL
) final_sub;

SELECT DISTINCT time_index, stage
FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"
WHERE stage IN ('IDLE', 'ACTIVE', 'DETECT_READY', 'PICK_READY', 'FILL_READY', 'CAP_READY')
  AND $__timeFilter(time_index)
ORDER BY time_index ASC;

SELECT 
    time_index1,
    (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (time_index2 - time_index1)))::bigint AS duration_seconds
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_index AS time_index1,
        LEAD(time_index, 10) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS time_index2,
        stage AS stage1,
        LEAD(stage, 10) OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY time_index) AS stage2
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT entity_id, time_index, stage
        FROM "mtopeniot"."ettaskpackbottle"
        WHERE $__timeFilter(time_index)
        ORDER BY time_index ASC
    ) unique_rows
) sub
WHERE stage1 = 'ACTIVE' 
  AND stage2 = 'HANDOVER_READY'
  AND stage1 <> stage2
  AND time_index2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY time_index1 ASC;

    time_index1,

FROM (
    SELECT
        time_index AS time_index1,

        stage AS stage1,

    FROM (

WHERE stage1 = 'ACTIVE'

ORDER BY time_index1 ASC;
